2605.20284.title: JUDO: A Juxtaposed Domain-Oriented Multimodal Reasoner for Industrial Anomaly QA
2605.20284.paper_summary: Industrial anomaly detection has been significantly advanced by Large Multimodal Models (LMMs), enabling diverse human instructions beyond detection, particularly through visually grounded reasoning for better image understanding. However, LMMs lack domain-specific knowledge, which limits their ability to generate accurate responses in complex industrial scenarios. In this work, we present JUDO, Juxtaposed Domain-Oriented Multimodal Reasoner, a framework that efficiently incorporates domain knowledge and context in visual and textual reasoning. Through visual reasoning, our model segments the defect region by juxtaposing query images with normal images as visual domain context, enabling a fine-grained visual comparative inspection. Furthermore, we inject domain knowledge through supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to enhance context understanding and subsequently guide domain reasoning through reinforcement learning (GRPO) with tailored rewards, opting for a domain-oriented reasoning process. Experimental results demonstrate that JUDO achieves superior performance on the MMAD benchmark, surpassing models such as Qwen2.5-VL-7B and GPT-4o. These results highlight the importance of enhancing domain knowledge and context for effective reasoning in anomaly understanding.
2605.20284.paper_summary_zh: 工業異常檢測已因大型多模態模型（LMMs）的顯著進步而得以提升，使得在檢測之外能夠執行多樣化的人類指令，特別是透過視覺基礎推理來改善圖像理解。然而，LMMs 缺乏領域特定知識，這限制了它們在複雜工業場景中生成準確回應的能力。在這項工作中，我們提出了 JUDO，並排的領域導向多模態推理器，這是一個有效整合領域知識和上下文的視覺與文本推理框架。通過視覺推理，我們的模型通過將查詢圖像與正常圖像並排作為視覺領域上下文來分割缺陷區域，從而實現細緻的視覺比較檢查。此外，我們通過監督微調（SFT）注入領域知識，以增強上下文理解，並隨後通過強化學習（GRPO）以量身定制的獎勵來指導領域推理，選擇領域導向的推理過程。實驗結果表明，JUDO 在 MMAD 基準上達到了卓越的性能，超越了 Qwen2.5-VL-7B 和 GPT-4o 等模型。這些結果突顯了增強領域知識和上下文對於有效推理在異常理解中的重要性。
2605.20284.author: Hyunju Kang et.al.
2605.20284.authors: Hyunju Kang, Woohyun Lee, Jaewon Kim, Hogun Park
